# [PKT-PRV-052](task-0119): Provider Data Quality

## Purpose

Implement provider data quality checks.

## Scope

- Quality metrics
- Monitoring
- Alerts

## Implementation

1. Define metrics
2. Add monitoring
3. Add alerts

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Metrics defined
2. Monitoring works
3. Alerts sent
